sections.sectionTitle: Jew mite in a Nan'theihna ding Thu Kipia

verses.text: Tua ni mahin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Jew mite' gal ahi Haman' neihsa khempeuh Kumpinu Esther tungah pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa' omna-ah Mordekai hong tung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a kinaina zia, kumpipa kiangah Esther in gen hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman' tung panin a lakkiksa minthuhna zungbuh pen suahkhia-in Mordekai a pia hi. Tua hi a, Haman' neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin Esther in Mordekai a koih hi
Kumpipa' mai-ah Esther khatvei va paikikin khitui naptui tawh a khe mai-ah va puk a, Agag mi Haman' vaihawm siatna lianpi leh Jew mite a sawmna thu a kipelhkik theihna dingin va thum hi
Kumpipa in Esther' lamah a kham ciangkhut na zan a

tua ciangin Esther thoto-in kumpipa mai-ah dingin, “Kei nong hehpihzawh a, hih ka ngaihsutna man na sak a, hoih na sak leh, na ukna gamsung khempeuhah a om Jew mite thahna ding a sawmna-in Agag-te beh Hammedatha' tapa Haman in a laigelhte dawhkikna dingin lai khat gelhsak in
Ka mipihte tungah hih siatna lianpi a tung ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam? Ahih kei leh ka innkuanpih tungah a tung hih siatna ka muh ding bangci thuakzawh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther leh Jew mi Mordekai tungah, “Haman in Jew mite thah hong sawm ahih manin sing tungah amah kikhailum khin a, Haman' neihsa khempeuh Esther' tungah kong pia khin hi

Kumpipa' min tawh kigelhin, kumpipa' minthuhna tawh a kithuh khinsa lai pen kidokkik thei nawnlo ahih manin, tu-in Jew mite tawh kisai-in hoih dinga na up bangin kumpipa' min tawh gelh in la, tua khit ciangin kumpipa' minthuhna zungbuh tawh thuh in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin a kha thumna ahi Sivan kha a ni sawmlethum ni-in kumpipa' lai-atte kisam a, Mordekai' gen bang teekteekin Jew mite tung leh India panin Ethiopia dong gam za khat leh sawmnihlesagih a uk ahi gam tampi a ukte, gam khat a ukte leh tua gamsunga uliante tungah lai kihawmkik a, amau' lai ciat leh amau' pau ciatin kigelh a, Jew mite-a' ding zong amau' lai leh amau' pau mahin kigelh hi
Tua lai pen Kumpipa Ahasueras' minin kigelhin kumpipa' min thuhna zungbuh mah tawh kithuh a, kumpi sakol bukah a kikhawi kumpipa' sakolte tungah laitaite kituangsakin lai kihawmsak hi

Kha sawmlenihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawmlethumna ni khat sungin Kumpi Ahasueras' ukna gamsung khempeuhah Jew mite in amau a sim ding mi ahih kei leh a gamte' hihna ding panin khua khempeuhah amau na kipawlin na kihu-in, tua banga amaute a hih dingte pen a numei a naupangin susia-in, thatin a beisakna ding uh leh a neihsate uh a laksak theihna dingun hih banga lai piakna tawh kumpipa in Jew mite tungah hih theihna ding thu a pia hi
Tua thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuhah kihawmin mi khempeuh kitheisakin, amau' galte a thukkikna ding ahi tua ni tawh kisai-in Jew mite a kigin'kholh ding uh ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa' sakolte tungah laitaite tuangin kumpipa' thu-kin sawl mah bangin nawhtai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah zong tua thupiakna lai a kihawm hi

Tua ciangin kumpi puan a san leh a kang silhin, kham tawh kibawl kumpi lukhu lianpi khu-in, saihadial puanneel leh puansan silhsa-in kumpipa' omna panin Mordekai paikhia hi. Tua ciangin Susa khuapi sung mi khempeuh lungdamin awng uh hi
Tua hi a, Jew mite in suahtakna, lungdamna, leh pahtawina ngah uh hi

Kumpipa' thupiakna a tun'na gam leh khua khempeuhah Jew mite-a' dingin lungdamna leh kipahna, pawi bawlna leh nasep khawlin zum khakna a om hi. Tua hi a, midangte in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin tua gama om mi tampi tak in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, a ci uh hi.
